2603.19144.title: UGID: Unified Graph Isomorphism for Debiasing Large Language Models
2603.19144.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit pronounced social biases. Output-level or data-optimization--based debiasing methods cannot fully resolve these biases, and many prior works have shown that biases are embedded in internal representations. We propose \underline{U}nified \underline{G}raph \underline{I}somorphism for \underline{D}ebiasing large language models (\textit{\textbf{UGID}}), an internal-representation--level debiasing framework for large language models that models the Transformer as a structured computational graph, where attention mechanisms define the routing edges of the graph and hidden states define the graph nodes. Specifically, debiasing is formulated as enforcing invariance of the graph structure across counterfactual inputs, with differences allowed only on sensitive attributes. \textit{\textbf{UGID}} jointly constrains attention routing and hidden representations in bias-sensitive regions, effectively preventing bias migration across architectural components. To achieve effective behavioral alignment without degrading general capabilities, we introduce a log-space constraint on sensitive logits and a selective anchor-based objective to preserve definitional semantics. Extensive experiments on large language models demonstrate that \textit{\textbf{UGID}} effectively reduces bias under both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings, significantly reduces internal structural discrepancies, and preserves model safety and utility.
2603.19144.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）顯示出明顯的社會偏見。基於輸出層或數據優化的去偏見方法無法完全解決這些偏見，許多先前的研究已顯示偏見嵌入在內部表示中。我們提出了\underline{U}nified \underline{G}raph \underline{I}somorphism for \underline{D}ebiasing large language models（\textit{\textbf{UGID}}），這是一個針對大型語言模型的內部表示層級去偏見框架，將Transformer建模為一個結構化計算圖，其中注意力機制定義了圖的路由邊，隱藏狀態定義了圖的節點。具體而言，去偏見被公式化為強制圖結構在反事實輸入之間的不變性，僅允許在敏感屬性上存在差異。\textit{\textbf{UGID}}在偏見敏感區域共同約束注意力路由和隱藏表示，有效防止偏見在架構組件之間的遷移。為了在不降低一般能力的情況下實現有效的行為對齊，我們引入了對敏感logits的對數空間約束和基於選擇性錨點的目標，以保留定義語義。對大型語言模型的廣泛實驗表明，\textit{\textbf{UGID}}在分佈內和分佈外設置下有效減少偏見，顯著減少內部結構差異，並保持模型的安全性和實用性。
2603.19144.author: Zikang Ding et.al.
2603.19144.authors: Zikang Ding, Junchi Yao, Junhao Li, Yi Zhang, Wenbo Jiang, Hongbo Liu, Lijie Hu
